title: AIDS Walk Atlanta Music Festival & 5K Run
description: Lace up and join ANIZ for a 5K walk and music festival supporting local HIV and AIDS service organizations. Participation helps fund free testing, counseling, and care in the community.

title: Aniz Access Fair
description: A free resource fair connecting community members to health screenings, social services, benefits enrollment, and support resources.

title: Self Love: Transformations & Makeovers
description: A celebration of self-care and confidence with free makeovers, wellness resources, and a supportive atmosphere.

title: Hoops and Health
description: March Madness with a healthy twist: interactive health booths, free HIV/STI testing, giveaways, and community fun.

title: MAGIC In the CITY Block Party
description: A vibrant outdoor block party with free health screenings, social services, entertainment, community resources, and family-friendly activities.

title: Friendsgiving Feast
description: A free holiday meal for ANIZ community members featuring food, resources, connection, and support.

title: Aniz Annual Toy Giveaway
description: ANIZ spreads holiday joy by distributing toys to families in need. Registration is required while supplies last.
